Revamp Crypto Rules: Milei Moneda Awaits!

Embark on a decentralized journey led by quirky wisdom, rebel against the ordinary. $MEDA unlocks exclusive NFTs, rewards, and financial autonomy in our evolving ecosystem.

How To Buy

Previous

2

Wallet Connection

Seamlessly integrate your preferred wallet, such as MetaMask, to facilitate smooth and secure transactions on the Milei Moneda platform. Connecting your wallet ensures a seamless and trustworthy interaction with the $MEDA ecosystem.

3

Buy Section

Once on the website, easily locate the dedicated "Buy" $MEDA section within the user interface. This streamlined process allows you to initiate the purchase of $MEDA tokens with convenience.

4

Transaction Completion

Specify the desired amount of $MEDA tokens you wish to acquire. Confirm the transaction through your connected wallet, and rest assured as your $MEDA token balance updates in real-time, marking the successful completion of your purchase.

1

Visit official site

Begin your $MEDA token journey by visiting the official Milei Moneda website. Here, you not only ensure secure transactions but also gain access to the latest updates and information regarding $MEDA.

2

Wallet Connection

Audit ReportBuy $MEDA

Tokenomics

  • 60% Public

    Real decentralization — 60% of tokens are available to the public through our platform.

  • 15% Liquidity Pools

    We provide stability and ease of trading by increasing liquidity in our pools.

  • 15% Marketing & Rewards

    Grow with us! We invest in marketing and rewards for an active community.

  • 5% Burn

    Reduce the total token supply, ensuring sustainable value growth.

  • 5% Airdrop

    We distribute tokens among community members through an airdrop.

Roadmap

Embark on our journey through five stages, from foundational development to token launch, community growth, innovation, and ecosystem expansion. Each step adds a note to our melodious march towards success and sustainability.

Previous

Stage 2

  • The official launch of the token.
  • Formation of strategic partnerships.
  • Securing a listing on the DEX and CEX exchanges.
  • Launch of a major marketing campaign.
  • Involvement of influencers for promotion.

Stage 3

  • Unlocking exclusive benefits for the community.
  • Reach a market capitalization of $1 billion.
  • Secure a listing on leading stock exchanges.
  • Hold regular virtual events and Q&A sessions.
  • Involve the community through raffles.

Stage 4

  • Implementation of unique features for $MEDA.
  • Introduce additional token usage options.
  • Strengthen partnerships with industry leaders.
  • Develop Play To Earn Game.

Stage 5

  • Collaboration with projects for cross-promotion.
  • Implement long-term and strategic marketing plans.
  • Expansion of partnerships with influencers and additional strategic collaborations.

Stage 1

  • Develop a secure, smart contract.
  • Creating an active community.
  • Launch comprehensive branding initiatives.
  • Ensuring a presence in social networks.
  • Conduct the first marketing campaigns.

Stage 2

  • The official launch of the token.
  • Formation of strategic partnerships.
  • Securing a listing on the DEX and CEX exchanges.
  • Launch of a major marketing campaign.
  • Involvement of influencers for promotion.

  • Unlocking exclusive benefits for the community.
  • Reach a market capitalization of $1 billion.

  • Hold regular virtual events and Q&A sessions.
  • Involve the community through raffles.

  • Introduce additional token usage options.
  • Strengthen partnerships with industry leaders.
  • Develop Play To Earn Game.

Stage 5

  • Collaboration with projects for cross-promotion.
  • Implement long-term and strategic marketing plans.
  • Expansion of partnerships with influencers and additional strategic collaborations.

Disclaimer

This meme token project, with its corresponding website, social media accounts, and any related communication, is not connected to, supported by, or associated with any actual individual, celebrity, public figure, or entity stated, portrayed, or referred to. Using any appellations, depictions, resemblances, or any other discernible attributes is exclusively for humor or satire and should not be construed as an endorsement or sponsorship. This project is solely designed for amusement and does not represent the perspectives or beliefs of any actual individuals stated or portrayed. The use of any mentions of actual individuals or organizations is not intended to inflict harm, disparage, or misrepresent. We disclaim any liability for the conduct or viewpoints of any actual individual referenced or portrayed.
